productDisplayName: Nike Men Dual Fusion Grey Sports Shoes
description: These Dual Fusion ST 2 shoes for men from nike with plush cushioning and supportive Fit are designed for serious runners. The single-layer mesh upper gives a breathable, comfortable fit while the phylon midsole gives cushioning, support and stability. Flex-foot grooves at the forefoot gives enhanced flexibility.UpperMesh upper with synthetic overlaysCentral lace upsPadded tongue with brandingMesh lining in the padded insoleMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfortOutsolenike waffle outsole with deep flex-groovesDecoupled heelshoe careBrush surface with a soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
